summary: Wyatt reminds Neville his wedding anniversary is on the 17th of September. Neville's wife is upset and it might be because Neville forgot about their anniversary.

Are you serious?

September 17. I hope you remember the year ;)

summary: John didn't show up for class due to some work issues with his boss. Cassandra, his teacher told him which exercises to do, and which chapter to study. They are going to meet up for a beer sometime this week after class.
utt: Ave. Was there any homework for tomorrow?
hello :D Of course, as always :D
What exactly?
I'm not sure so I'll check it for you in 20minutes.
Cool, thanks. Sorry I couldn't be there, but I was busy as fuck...my stupid boss as always was trying to piss me off
No problem, what did he do this time?
Nothing special, just the same as always, treating us like children, commanding to do this and that...
sorry to hear that. but why don't you just go to your chief and tell him everything?

I understand...Nevertheless, just try to ignore him. I know it might sound ridiculous as fuck, but sometimes there's nothing more you can do.
yeah I know...maybe some beer this week?
Sure, but I got some time after classes only...this week is gonna be busy
no problem, I can drive you home and we can go to some bar or whatever.
cool. ok, I got this homework. it's page 15 ex. 2 and 3, I also asked the others to study another chapter, especially the vocabulary from the very first pages. Just read it.
gosh...I don't know if I'm smart enough to do it :'D
you are, don't worry :P Just circle all the words you don't know and we'll continue on Monday.
ok...then I'll try my best :D
sure, if you will have any questions just either text or call me and I'll help you.
I hope I won't have to waste your time xD
you're not wasting my time, I'm your teacher, I'm here to help. This is what I get money for, also :P
just kidding :D ok, so i guess we'll stay in touch then
sure, have a nice evening :D
you too, se ya
Byeeeee

summary: Sarah sends James an instrumental song he might like. James knows the song. The brain connects the songs to the context they were played in and brings to mind the associated memories.
utt: I found a song on youtube and I think you'll like it
What song?
<file_other>
Oh. I know it!
I heard it before in some compilation
I can't stop playing it over and over
That's exactly how I know lyrics to all of the songs on my playlist :D
Haha. No lyrics here though. Instrumental ;D
Instrumental songs are different kind of music.
But you have to remember that the activity you do when you listen to this song
Is the actvity your brain will connect to the song
And everytime you play this song at home
You'll be thinking of your work
Yeah, I know that. That's why we sometimes say - I used to like that song, but now it just reminds me of bad memories
Yup. Everytime you change your partner, you have to get rid of your favorite music :D
Hahaha. True, true.
